stemHtml: Why is there a limit on the full rudder deflection as airspeed (IAS) increases on transport aeroplanes?

options.a: To reduce the directional stability at high airspeed.
options.b: Full rudder deflection is not to be limited on transport aeroplanes as airspeed increases.
options.c: Because full rudder deflection could create an excessive load on the structure.
options.d: To reduce the risk of entering a spiral divergence in cruise.
